classification.reasoning: The patch introduces significant structural changes to the PredicateAnalyzer class, including new handling for partial query expressions and un-analyzable nodes, which affects the core query analysis logic. It also modifies the CalciteLogicalIndexScan class to support partial filter pushdown with complex condition reconstruction and changes the pushDownFilter method to handle partial queries differently. These changes involve deep structural refactoring and API divergence in the query planning and execution components. The patch also adds new test cases and expected outputs to verify partial filter pushdown behavior. Given the complexity and the need to adapt to new partial pushdown semantics, this patch is classified as TYPE_IV with high confidence.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of AbstractRelNode to the imports list.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable usage of AbstractRelNode type in the class, likely for more general type handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Changed the type of the variable holding the pushed down filter result from CalciteLogicalIndexScan to AbstractRelNode and updated the transformTo call accordingly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To generalize the type of the pushed down relational expression, allowing for more flexible transformations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of lombok.Getter annotation.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable use of Lombok's @Getter annotation for automatic generation of getter methods.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored analyze method to delegate to a new analyze_ method that returns a QueryExpression, and simplified analyze to return the builder directly.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To separate concerns by splitting analysis into two methods: one returning the full QueryExpression and one returning just the QueryBuilder, improving modularity and reuse.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a failedCount variable to track number of failed operand analyses in a loop over call operands.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To keep track of how many operands failed analysis for later conditional logic.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: After successfully analyzing an operand, if it is not partial, update or simplify its analyzed nodes with the original RexNode operand.
hunk_descriptions.where_in_code: PredicateAnalyzer.Visitor.visitCall (inside try block for operand analysis)
hunk_descriptions.intent: To maintain or improve the accuracy of analyzed nodes for fully analyzable expressions, possibly for better query construction or optimization.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Incremented failedCount on operand analysis failure and replaced failed operand with an UnAnalyzableQueryExpression wrapping the original RexNode.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To track failures and preserve un-analyzable operands for later reuse or special handling, enabling partial query pushdown.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a check in handling AND expressions to throw an exception if all operands failed analysis before constructing the CompoundQueryExpression.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To prevent constructing an AND expression when none of its operands are analyzable, ensuring correctness and avoiding invalid queries.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Rewrote the QueryExpression abstract class to be public, added abstract methods for managing analyzed and un-analyzable RexNodes, and replaced many abstract operator methods with default implementations that throw exceptions with detailed messages.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enhance the QueryExpression abstraction by tracking analyzed and unanalyzable nodes, and to provide clearer error handling for unsupported operations, improving robustness and debuggability.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added a new UnAnalyzableQueryExpression class representing expressions that cannot be analyzed, implementing QueryExpression and providing relevant methods; modified CompoundQueryExpression to be public, add @Getter annotations, and track analyzed and unAnalyzable RexNodes lists.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To explicitly represent unanalyzable expressions and enhance compound expressions with tracking of analyzed and unanalyzable nodes for better partial query handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Modified CompoundQueryExpression.and method to aggregate analyzed and unanalyzable nodes from all expressions and only add builders for expressions that are not UnAnalyzableQueryExpression.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To properly accumulate node information for partial query analysis and avoid adding unanalyzable expressions to the query builder, improving correctness.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: In CompoundQueryExpression, added implementation of updateAnalyzedNodes method to update the analyzedNodes list; removed all overridden operator methods that threw exceptions except for not(), which remains implemented.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support updating analyzed nodes in compound expressions and simplify operator method overrides by removing redundant exception-throwing methods.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Enhanced getFieldReferenceForTermQuery method in SimpleQueryExpression to throw a PredicateAnalyzerException if the field reference is null, proactively preventing errors.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To fail fast and signal partial pushdown necessity when a field reference for term query is missing, improving error handling.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added implementations of getUnAnalyzableNodes, getAnalyzedNodes, and updateAnalyzedNodes methods in SimpleQueryExpression to manage the analyzed RexNode; retained existing not() override.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable SimpleQueryExpression to track and update its analyzed RexNode and report no unanalyzable nodes, supporting partial query analysis.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added Javadoc comment to PushDownAction record describing its purpose and parameters.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To improve code documentation and clarify the role of PushDownAction in pushdown operations.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of AbstractRelNode to imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support usage of AbstractRelNode type in this class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added imports for RexBuilder, RexNode, and SqlStdOperatorTable.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To enable construction and manipulation of RexNode expressions and usage of standard SQL operators.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added import of PredicateAnalyzer.QueryExpression to imports.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To directly reference QueryExpression type from PredicateAnalyzer in this class.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Refactored pushDownFilter method to use PredicateAnalyzer.analyze_ returning a QueryExpression, handle partial query expressions by constructing new filter conditions from unanalyzable nodes, and return either a new CalciteLogicalIndexScan or a Filter wrapping it accordingly; also changed return type to AbstractRelNode.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To support partial filter pushdown by distinguishing analyzable and unanalyzable parts of the filter condition and correctly constructing the resulting relational expression.

hunk_descriptions.what_changed: Added private static helper method constructCondition to combine multiple RexNode conditions into a single AND expression or return the single condition if only one exists.
hunk_descriptions.intent: To facilitate construction of combined filter conditions from multiple unanalyzable RexNodes during partial pushdown.
